channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Engine Ratings
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Piraeus, Greece or Misurata, Libya
Description:

Qualified Oilers and Fitters are urgently sought to join a Container Vessel. The position offers a salary of USD 1,100/month for Oilers and USD 1,500/month for Fitters. Joining is expected within one week in Piraeus, Greece, or Misurata, Libya. Applicants must possess a Panama Seaman's Passport and relevant experience. All nationalities are welcome.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Oiler and Fitter Jobs on Container Vessel at VNW Marine Services (Vanguard Next Wave)

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Plumbers are sought to join the Engine Department aboard a cruise ship. This role offers the chance to become part of an international team at sea. Key requirements include relevant experience in plumbing and a willingness to work within a dynamic maritime environment.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Plumber Job on Cruise Ship at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location: North Coast of Scotland
Description:

A Motorman position is available on a permanent basis for a leading Scottish ferry operator. This role offers a 2 weeks on / 2 weeks off rotation and is based on the North Coast of Scotland. Essential requirements include an EWR Certificate, valid ENG1 Medical Certificate, and relevant STCW certification. Previous passenger vessel experience is desirable. A competitive salary package, workplace pension, and health benefits are provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Motorman Job on Ferry - Permanent Position at Clyde Marine Recruitment

item.description:
Location: North Coast of Scotland
Description:

A Motorman position is available on a permanent basis for a ferry operating on the North Coast of Scotland. The role offers a 2 weeks on / 2 weeks off rotation. Essential requirements include EWR Certificate, valid ENG1 Medical Certificate, and valid STCW certification. Previous passenger vessel experience is desirable. A competitive salary package, workplace pension, and health benefits are provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Motorman Job on Ferry - Permanent Position at Clyde Marine Recruitment
[Gold Job] Looking for Fitter/Welder on board Ferry with III/5 diploma ASAP at

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

An Engine Fitter position is available on a Bulk Carrier vessel operating worldwide. This role is based with the company's team in the Philippines. Further details about the job and application process can be found via the provided link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Engine Fitter Job on Bulk Carrier Vessel at OSM Thome Jobs at Sea

item.description:
Location: Offshore / International
Description:

Deck Motorman position available on a Pipe-Lay Vessel for offshore construction. Joining is scheduled for July 20-21, 2026, with a contract duration of 2 weeks. Required qualifications include BOSIET with CA-EBS, full STCW package, Marlins Test, relevant experience on similar vessels, and a valid medical certificate.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Motorman Job on Pipe-Lay Vessel at BalticCareer

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Fitter is sought for an Ore carrier vessel. The contract duration is 4 months +/- 1, with joining expected at the beginning of August. The salary offered is 3700 EUR. Candidates must have relevant experience on similar vessels, hold a COC III/5, valid STCW documents, and a medical certificate. A good command of English is required, and only EU passport holders will be considered.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Fitter Job on Ore Carrier Vessel at OJ Crew

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Oiler with a minimum of 2 years of experience on similar vessel types is required for an AHTS vessel operating under an ADNOC project. Candidates must possess an Able Seafarer Engine / Oiler (III/5) COP issued from their home country, with all documents valid for 12 months. Applicants should not hold a valid UAE visa. Immediate joining is expected. Salary is to be discussed.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Oiler Job on AHTS Vessel - ADNOC Project at Aavishka

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Oiler is sought for an AHTS DP vessel engaged in an ADNOC project. The role requires a minimum of 2 years of experience as an Oiler on similar vessel types, with an Able Seafarer Engine / Oiler (III/5) COP from the home country. All documents must be valid for 12 months, and candidates should not possess a valid UAE visa. Salary is to be discussed, with immediate joining required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Oiler Job on AHTS Vessel - ADNOC Project at aavishka.com
